introSection: Tigor Mountain is a steel roller coaster located at Beto Carrero World in Penha, Santa Catarina, Brazil.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and white supports. The ride used to feature blue track and red supports at Fantasy Place.

fullText:
Tigor Mountain is a steel roller coaster located at Beto Carrero World in Penha, Santa Catarina, Brazil.



Blue track and white supports. The ride used to feature blue track and red supports at Fantasy Place.
